sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23605" key="dede/atai" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδέαται·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δέδενται,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δέδεια·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φοβοῦ,</foreign> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδειαί·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δειλίαι,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδείκελος</orth>, <sense id="n23605.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">timorous,</tr_> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδειπνάναι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δειπνέω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
